trending_videos.title: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd STAGE | Official Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
STEEL BALL RUN JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure 2nd & 3rd Stage (all 11 episodes) will premiere on Netflix each Friday, starting on September 25.

A desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles—the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must make their way through, is home to the dreaded area known as the “Devil’s Palm.”
As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition.
The two press forward into the 2nd STAGE, where countless hidden motives collide.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82181513

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd STAGE | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

trending_videos.title: BLG vs T1 | MSI 2026 |  Bracket Stage Day 2
trending_videos.description:
CALL YOUR SHOT.

The International Competition is ramping up with MSI 2026 in Daejeon, South Korea, at the Daejeon Convention Center.  The Play-In Stage features a 4-team, double-elimination bracket, which qualifies one team into the Bracket Stage— where they will compete against seven other teams. 

To learn more about the MSI format, check out https://riot.com/4o3QR9r

Play-Ins: June 28 - July 1
Bracket Stage: July 3-6 & 8-12
Upper Final: July 9
Lower Final: July 11
Grand Final: July 12

trending_videos.title: The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All | Official Teaser | Crunchyroll
trending_videos.description:
The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All is coming to Crunchyroll in 2027!

ABOUT THE GUY SHE WAS INTERESTED IN WASN'T A GUY AT ALL
Fashionable and upbeat high schooler Aya loves listening to rock, but no one else seems to share her interest…until she meets a cool, stylish employee at a CD shop. Dressed in black from head to toe, he has this air of mystery about him, and his taste in music is impeccable. Aya falls hard for him—not knowing her crush is actually her female classmate Mitsuki! For her part, Mitsuki generally keeps to herself and avoids standing out at school. But given that she sits right next to Aya, Mitsuki’s all too aware of the other girl’s feelings, and she’s afraid to reveal the truth. So why does she find herself talking with Aya more and more…?

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL
Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! Stream new anime, full episodes, movies, OVAs, music, openings, endings, trailers and all the best moments in anime, subbed and dubbed!

trending_videos.title: PV 第2弾　アニメ『スティール・ボール・ラン ジョジョの奇妙な冒険』｜2nd Trailer !!　"STEEL BALL RUN JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure"
trending_videos.description:
2nd & 3rd STAGE（全11話）2026年9月25日よりNetflixにて毎週金曜日 世界独占先行配信開始予定！
2nd & 3rd STAGE (11 episodes total)Coming to Netflix from September 25, 2026New episodes streaming every Friday, worldwide exclusively on Netflix!

【INTRODUCTION】 
総距離約750マイルの砂漠越え――
ジョニィ・ジョースターとジャイロ・ツェペリが挑むその砂漠には“悪魔の手のひら”と恐れられる土地が存在した。
さらに、不穏な事件が巻き起こり、このレースがただの競技大会ではないことを思い知らされる。
ふたりは様々な思惑が交錯する2nd STAGEへ立ち向かう。
A desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles-
the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must challenge, is home to the area that is feared as the "Devil's Palm." As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition.
The two press forward into the 2nd STAGE, where countless hidden motives collide.

Pull up a chair, Survivors. Everyone knows the legendary ARK veteran Bob - played by Karl Urban - but you haven't truly heard a tale until you've survived his swashbuckling exploits on the high seas. DiverseContent.Observation: The trending videos cover a wide range of genres including anime, gaming, music, and live streams.
DiverseContent.Insight: This diversity suggests a broad audience base and indicates an opportunity to create cross-genre content that taps into multiple interests.

AnimeDominance.Observation: Anime-related content appears twice in the list with 'STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure' featuring prominently.
AnimeDominance.Insight: Anime continues to be a strong trend, and there is potential for creators to produce related content such as reviews, reaction videos, or in-depth analyses to capture this audience.

GamingContent.Observation: Gaming content appears in titles like 'I Got Trained By a Minecraft Combat Master' and live streams such as 'THE QUEST FOR THE BLACK KEY'.
GamingContent.Insight: Gaming remains a popular category, particularly for live streaming, suggesting that interactive and community-driven content can be a key engagement strategy.

TopChannels.Observation: Top channels like Netflix and LoL Esports indicate that established brands with existing fan bases are leveraging YouTube for promotional content.
TopChannels.Insight: Emerging creators can collaborate with these brands to gain visibility or create content that taps into these existing fan bases.

IndividualCreators.Observation: Creators like 'The Critical Drinker' and 'VanossGaming' are also present, highlighting the impact of individual personalities.
IndividualCreators.Insight: Building a strong personal brand and consistent content style can help creators achieve sustained visibility and engagement.

Cross-Platform Promotion.Opportunity: Platforms like Netflix and Crunchyroll using YouTube for trailers suggest a strategy of cross-platform promotion.
Cross-Platform Promotion.ActionableInsight: Creators should consider leveraging YouTube as a promotional tool for content on other platforms, potentially increasing cross-platform viewership and subscriber growth.

Localization and Language.Opportunity: With anime content often originating in non-English languages, there's an opportunity for localized content or subtitled versions.
Localization and Language.ActionableInsight: Creating localized content or partnering with translators can expand reach to non-English speaking audiences, tapping into underserved market segments.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
